copy.bulletinIntro: Hall notes, events, raffles & little scroll updates keep the guild lanterns glowing.
copy.doorsIntro: Explore the ways that guide Mōchirīī along its wanderers filled path.
copy.spotlightIntro: Pretty guild member who's always so lovely, beautiful & keeping the guild a wonderful place for everyone.
copy.galleryIntro: Screenshots from baddie smashing, pretty roads, lantern-lit detours & small moments that become guild memory.

hero.subtitle: Asia Pacific • Where Winds Meet Guild
descriptor: Mōchirīī is a cozy little guild for wanderers seeking friendly company, whimsical events, baddie smashing battles & lots of cupcakes with a place to rest along the cultivation road.

Optional Discord, come follow the joining path & grow at your own pace beneath the lantern glow. Read the event notes, RSVP to events that interest you & bring a little frosting warmth to the guild as we wander onward together.

seal.title: Guild Seal
verse: Silvered jade softly gleams, where quiet petals fall,
Bamboo stands in patient grace, a guardian to all.
Hearts gather here in gentle light, unhurried, warm & true,
A seal of trust, of shared resolve, where kindred spirits grew.

bulletins.title: Monthly cosmetics raffle open to all members who sign up each month.
Leadership roles are open for members ready to carry a lantern for others.
